project.name: Let's Snog
project.description: The cheeky, London-first dating app fixing frustrations with Tinder/Bumble. Smart matches, speed-dating events, and real organised dates.

surface.description: Navy tint for cards and elevated elements

primary.description: Hot Pink - Core CTA and brand identity

secondary.description: Electric Cyan - For secondary accents and 'Super-like' equivalent

typography.anti_ai_rules: No Inter, Roboto, Open Sans for headings. Embracing bold character.

body.description: Clean, highly legible geometric sans for UI density

accents.description: Used sparingly for cheeky hand-written notes or arrows ('Start Snogging ->')

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Mobile-first PWA, utilizing vertical space for swipe decks. Generous padding in forms.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4, p-6, p-8 for inner card paddings. Massive gaps (gap-12, gap-24) for landing page sections.
layout_and_spacing.containers: max-w-md mx-auto for app views (simulating mobile frame on desktop), max-w-7xl for landing page.
layout_and_spacing.bottom_nav: Fixed bottom inset-x-0 h-16 bg-slate-950/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/10 z-50 flex justify-around items-center rounded-t-2xl shadow-[0_-8px_32px_rgba(255,42,133,0.1)]

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-[#FF2A85] text-white font-bold tracking-wide hover:bg-[#FF4D9C] hover:drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,42,133,0.6)] transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-transparent border-2 border-slate-700 text-white hover:border-[#00F0FF] hover:text-[#00F0FF] transition-all

cards.swipe_card: relative w-full aspect-[3/4] rounded-3xl overflow-hidden shadow-2xl touch-none
cards.swipe_overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/90 via-black/30 to-transparent flex flex-col justify-end p-6
cards.venue_card: bg-[#0E1428] rounded-2xl p-4 border border-white/5 hover:border-[#FF2A85]/50 transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-slate-900/50 border border-slate-700 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white focus:border-[#FF2A85] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF2A85] transition-all outline-none

component_strategy.surface: Glassmorphism preferred for modals, sticky headers, and bottom nav to let the rich background colors bleed through.

animations.page_transitions: Framer Motion: gentle fade and slide up (y: 20 -> 0, opacity: 0 -> 1, duration: 0.3s).
animations.swipe_interactions: Framer Motion useDrag. Rotate slightly based on x offset. Spring physics on release.

hero_backgrounds.description: Abstract neon lights for landing page hero background

venues.description: Ye Olde Watling Pub London night

icons.strategy: Stroke width 2.5 for solid modern feel. Phosphor icons (@phosphor-icons/react) recommended if duotone needed.

data_testid_instructions: ALL interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Unbounded, Outfit, and Caveat fonts via Google Fonts in index.html.

Implement Mobile-First layout: The main App shell should max-width at 450px and center on desktop to simulate a mobile app, or use a proper responsive split-pane if requested. Mobile PWA feel is critical.
Do not use generic Shadcn cards for the main 'swipe deck'. Build a custom Framer Motion drag component over a full-bleed image card.
Ensure the Bottom Navigation is fixed and has a high z-index, using glassmorphism.
Use the venue images for the 'Speed Dating' and 'Date Organiser' sections.
Inject British slang playfully: 'Cheers', 'Mate', 'Fancy a drink?', 'Fit', 'Ghosting is for wankers' (in feedback gate).
